ocr_findings.description: The large embedded two-column glossary spread image (showing 重要用語総復習 list pages) is replaced by a single figure placeholder. The actual glossary term entries visible in that image — dozens of Japanese IT terms — are not transcribed. This is a structural feature preview image, not the glossary itself, so the loss is contextual rather than primary content loss.
Cleaned MD renders '最重要なものこれを厳選して' which appears to have a spurious '这を' insertion compared to expected '最重要なものを厳選して' — minor transcription artifact in one sentence.

reviewer_notes: This page is an introduction/how-to-use page for the 重要用語総復習 back-matter section, plus a コラム on memorization techniques. It is NOT itself a glossary page — it contains an embedded screenshot of glossary pages and explanatory prose. Labeling it 'glossary' is a false positive; 'other' is more accurate. The cleaned OCR captures the prose and column text well, but the embedded glossary preview image content is not transcribed (expected). One minor wrong_char artifact found in the cleaned text.
